title: Define ask frontdoor contract
goal: Specify ask request, ask context pack and answer scaffold for repobrief ask / lens ask.

acceptance.assertion: Ask request includes query, task_profile, token_budget, snapshot/freshness policy and output mode.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Context pack includes snapshot ref, freshness, availability, required reading, retrieval hits, resolved ranges and non-claims.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: The contract forbids implicit refresh, Git mutation and snapshot creation on read.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: An answer scaffold makes citation obligations and caveats visible to downstream agents.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.created_from_plan: RepoBrief Frontdoor and Grounding Verifier v1
metadata.outcome: Implemented by Lenskit PR #934: read-only Ask Frontdoor request/context-pack contracts, answer scaffold, docs, matrix entry and schema tests.

verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t004-request: repobrief-ask-request.v1 requires query, task_profile, token_budget, snapshot_policy and output_mode.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t004-context-pack: repobrief-ask-context-pack.v1 requires snapshot_ref, freshness, availability, required_reading, retrieval_hits, resolved_ranges and non-claims.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t004-no-refresh: schemas require existing_snapshot_only and full forbidden_operations including implicit_refresh, git_mutation and snapshot_creation_on_read.
verified_acceptance.rbgv-v1-t004-agent-output: answer_scaffold requires citation_obligations, caveats_to_surface and non_claims_to_surface.

checks: Lenskit PR #934 CI all green before merge
